name: forgekits
description: Production-grade Claude Code plugins for marketing automation, AI process decomposition, and AI-guided SDLC. Built by a Claude Certified Architect.

plugins.name: client-attraction-engine-lite
plugins.description: Free taste of the Client Attraction Engine: Split Test Lab (A/B variant generator) + Pipeline Health Check. Upgrade to Premium for the full 6-agent, 12-skill marketing system.

plugins.name: process-decomposition-lite
plugins.description: Free intro to the AI Process Decomposition framework: decompose any workflow into humans, AI skills, and AI agents. Premium unlocks the full 9-phase method, registries, and SOC2/HIPAA/GDPR compliance templates.

plugins.name: sdlc-forge-lite
plugins.description: Free taste of SDLC Forge: the Forge Guide orchestrator, phase detection, and the morning-standup command. Premium unlocks 100+ commands, ForgeSync (GitHub/ADO/Jira), and 63 templates.
